message:
fix: enforce same-type blocking validation for dependencies (GH#1495)

Tasks can only block tasks; epics can only block epics. Cross-type
blocking (task<->epic) caused deadlocks in ready work computation.

Validation lives in the storage layer (AddDependency) so it catches
all callers (CLI, RPC, MCP). Piggybacks on existing existence checks
to avoid extra queries.

Based on PR #2292 by l0g1x, with fixes:
- Removed duplicate CLI-layer validation (storage layer is authoritative)
- Optimized queries (SELECT issue_type instead of COUNT + re-query)
- Fixed variable naming (sourceIsEpic/targetIsEpic)

Co-Authored-By: Krystian Gebis <krystian@l0g1x.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
